title: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Wet Close-Up Portrait
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Wet Close Up Portrait
prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic wet close-up portrait of a beautiful young woman in side profile, captured like a luxury skincare campaign mixed with an A24 film still. Natural wet dark hair strands sticking organically to glowing skin, ultra-detailed water droplets and micro moisture beads across forehead, cheeks, eyelashes, and lips. Hyper-realistic skin texture with visible pores, soft peach fuzz, subtle redness, natural imperfections, and realistic damp shine — no plastic AI skin. Sharp focus on mesmerizing green-hazel eyes with deep cinematic reflections and emotional intensity. Slightly parted glossy lips with natural hydration texture. Cold rainy atmosphere with diffused soft window lighting, muted grey-blue tones, elegant white/grey creamy bokeh background, shallow depth of field, 85mm cinematic lens, editorial beauty photography, luxury skincare advertisement aesthetic, raw authentic realism, emotionally captivating composition, subtle melancholy mood, modern viral Instagram editorial energy, insanely photorealistic, masterpiece quality, natural color grading, premium Vogue beauty campaign feel.

Negative prompt: overprocessed skin, AI smoothness, extra shine, cartoon look, unrealistic eyes, plastic texture, bad anatomy, distorted facial features, oversaturated colors, fake droplets, low detail, uncanny expression.

Aspect ratio 4:5
